item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 3min Walks on the Enter Sandman and has a shirt with rainbows and Unicorns on it………. Only on t
item.description: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 3min Walks on the Enter Sandman and has a shirt with rainbows and Unicorns on it………. Only on the Euro Tour can this happen 27

item.title: JayShaw180: Jay Shaw @JayShaw180 · 6min I think Daryl Gurney would benefit from going back to the drawing board and reverting his th
item.description: Jay Shaw @JayShaw180 · 6min I think Daryl Gurney would benefit from going back to the drawing board and reverting his throw back to how it was when he was winning majors. Has never quite looked the same since he started flicking darts into the board and seems to have lost all scoring power. 54

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 7min Oskar Lukasiak has finally gotten over the line against Daryl Gurney to win his first ever match
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 7min Oskar Lukasiak has finally gotten over the line against Daryl Gurney to win his first ever match on the European Tour.
The Swede led 5-1 but a slew of missed match darts allowed Superchin to roar back and force a deciding leg.
Lukasiak finally fell over the line with his tenth Mostrar más 1 94

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 8min 𝗟𝗨𝗞𝗔𝗦𝗜𝗔𝗞 𝗣𝗨𝗡𝗜𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗦 𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥
After initially leading 5-1 and missing a total of ni
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 8min 𝗟𝗨𝗞𝗔𝗦𝗜𝗔𝗞 𝗣𝗨𝗡𝗜𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗦 𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥
After initially leading 5-1 and missing a total of nine match darts, Oskar Lukasiak falls over the line to finally punish a diabolical display from Daryl Gurney - who averaged just 77 1 1 1 739

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 9min LUKASIAK BREAKS NEW GROUND!
Osakr Lukasiak wins his first ever game on the European Tour
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 9min LUKASIAK BREAKS NEW GROUND!
Osakr Lukasiak wins his first ever game on the European Tour, and it came with his TENTH match dart in the contest!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 11 2 26 4 mil
